title: Bajaj Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
